reason: Backend/script checklist and KGTraceVis invariants for automation and QA work.
Reusable automation and QA logic should live under src/kgtracevis; scripts should orchestrate.
KG QA must enforce source-constrained KG CSV contracts and provenance rules.
Automation and QA scripts should fail clearly on invalid inputs.
Defines pytest, ruff, mypy, examples, and experiment quality gates.
Scripts should print concise summaries and avoid noisy output.
Automation should reuse existing script/core helpers rather than duplicate metric/KG logic.
Experiment summaries cross schema, KG, metrics, scripts, generated outputs, and paper assets.
